# Pull Request

## Summary

- What changed?

## Motivation

- Why is this change needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] docs
- [ ] tool behavior
- [ ] security
- [ ] transport
- [ ] config
- [ ] tests
- [ ] compatibility
- [ ] packaging

## Affected Exposure Profiles

- [ ] safe
- [ ] ops
- [ ] admin
- [ ] all
- [ ] no runtime profile change

## Affected Transports

- [ ] stdio
- [ ] Streamable HTTP stateful
- [ ] Streamable HTTP stateless
- [ ] no transport change

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:integration`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage-matrix`
- [ ] `pnpm docs:compatibility`
- [ ] `pnpm docs:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm docs:tools`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm test:package:installed`
- [ ] `pnpm pack:validate`

List anything skipped and why:

## Generated Docs

- generated docs updated:
- generated docs not needed because:

## Security Considerations

- redaction, confirmations, feature flags, auth, or SSRF impact:

## Breaking Changes

- breaking changes:

## Screenshots or Terminal Output

- add rendered docs, client config screenshots, or terminal output when setup/docs behavior changed

## Follow-up Work

- follow-up items:

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include real tokens, cookies, private URLs, or production logs
- [ ] I did not claim official MCPHub affiliation
- [ ] I used the smallest reasonable exposure profile
- [ ] I updated generated docs if registry or coverage changed
- [ ] I updated security or config docs if behavior changed
